title: Mauled to death by XL bully dogs: UK rapper jailed for mother-in-law’s fatal death in canine attack
summary_full: A UK rapper has been jailed for over 10 years after his XL bully dogs fatally attacked his mother-in-law. The court found clear warnings about the banned breed were ignored, and the dogs were kept in poor conditions. The attack occurred just two days after new laws banning the breed came into effect.
